ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "house" TEXT /* House the student belongs to (e.g., Gryffindor, Slytherin) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7) */,
  "blood_status" TEXT /* Student's blood status (e.g., pure-blood, half-blood, muggle-born) */,
  "magical_background" TEXT /* Student's magical background (e.g., wizarding family, non-magical family) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questionnaires" (
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each questionnaire */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the questionnaire question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., personality trait, course preference) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., bravery, loyalty, ambition) */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("questionnaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student responding */,
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the questionnaire question */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the student's response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the student responded */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Student's confidence level in their response (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_questionnaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("questionnaire_id") REFERENCES questionnaires ("questionnaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "course_category" TEXT /* Category of the course (e.g., magical theory, practical magic) */,
  "course_level" INTEGER /* Level of the course (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended course */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the course recommendation */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year of enrollment */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade earned by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "evaluation_text" TEXT /* Text of the student's evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, administrator) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questionnaire_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "questionnaire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the questionnaire */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, essay) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questionnaire_questions_questionnaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("questionnaire_id") REFERENCES questionnaires ("questionnaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questionnaire_answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Whether the answer is correct or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questionnaire_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questionnaire_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "interest_name" TEXT /* Name of the interest */,
  "interest_level" INTEGER /* Level of interest (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_interests_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
